decisions.rationale: The observation already resolves to its correct canonical record (project_12-webster-ave). The base_record_id matches the existing registry card exactly, and the source (2012_10_webster_sbs_newsletter) is already listed in that card's source_ids. Per the rule that when the closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id, the decision is new — the observation is already canonicalized.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Select Bus Service (SBS) is coming to Webster Avenue through a partnership between the New York City Department of Transportation (DOT) and MTA New York City Transit (NYCT). See the photo below to learn about SBS improvements, which will make bus travel faster and more reliable for the 22,000 daily riders on the Bx41 route.
The diagram illustrates the project schedule from Winter 2011-12 to 2013-2014. It features a horizontal timeline with vertical dashed lines marking each phase.
